mapper.select: SELECT p.id AS post_id,p.user_id, p.title, p.content, p.created_at AS post_created_at,u.email, u.nickname, u.created_at AS user_created_at FROM users u INNER JOIN posts p ON u.id=p.user_id WHERE p.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO posts (user_id, title, content) VALUES (#{userId},#{title},#{content})
